zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix von Rheineck於1120年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次阿維利海內可時，她的父親Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck43歲，母親Gertrud von Northeim30歲。她和Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1163年之後在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福可萊斯 斯托爾瑙洛姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix von Rheineck于1120年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次阿維利海內可时，她的父亲Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck43岁，母亲Gertrud von Northeim30岁。她和Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1163年之后在德国海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福可萊斯 斯托爾瑙洛姆。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rheineck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of the places in Germany and Switzerland called Reineck or Rheineck, for example one in Bavaria and another near Rorschach, Switzerland.

variants.name: Reinecke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Ernst, Fritz, Gunther, Hans, Manfred, Otto, Wilhelm.
North German: from a pet form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names formed with ragin ‘counsel’ as the first element. See also Reincke .

variants.name: Reinecker
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called Reineck or Rheineck (see   Reineck  ).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix von Rheineck was born in 1120, in Rheineck, Ahrweiler, Rhineland, Prussia, her father, Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck, was 43 and her mother, Gertrud von Northeim, was 30. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund. She died after 1163, in Loccum, Stolzenau, Hanover, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix von Rheineck est née en 1120, à Rheineck, Ahrweiler, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Gertrud von Northeim, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund. Elle est décédée après 1163, à Loccum, Kreis Stolzenau, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.Loccum, Stolzenau, Hannover, Preußen, Du: Loccum, Kreis Stolzenau, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix von Rheineck 1120 in Rheineck, Ahrweiler, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck 43 und ihre Mutter Gertrud von Northeim 30. Sie hatte mit Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1163 in Loccum, Kreis Stolzenau, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund. Morì dopo il 1163, nel Loccum, Kreis Stolzenau, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Germania.

ko.Loccum, Stolzenau, Hannover, Preußen, Du: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 크레이스 스톨즌오 록c
ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix von Rheineck(이)가 1120년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 아h위러 리이네c크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrud von Northeim(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1163년 이후 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 크레이스 스톨즌오 록c에서 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund. Ela faleceu após 1163, em Loccum, Kreis Stolzenau, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.Loccum, Stolzenau, Hannover, Preußen, Du: локкум, крис столзенау, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix von Rheineck родилась в 1120 г. в местности рааинекк, ахрвилир, раинпровинз, Пруссия, её отцу по имени Otto I. von Salm Graf von Rheineck было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Gertrud von Northeim, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Wulbrand Wildeshausen von Loccum-Hallermund. Она умерла после 1163 г. в местности локкум, крис столзенау, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия.
